notes: Alpha lane systems_thinker minimal-change child result for T-9013.
Written directly inside the assigned child artifact without shared-state edits.

evidence.finding: C45 already owns route-level execution mode selection, leased-cognition containment, provider scrubbing, fallback behavior, and lease-bound provenance graphs. The missing seam is internal backend selection, not a new top-level inference authority.

C42 makes execution priming explicit but keeps runtime authority out of the tool path. Any inference backend change must remain subordinate to C42/C23 lease issuance rather than becoming an ambient microservice runtime.
C47 already owns native model adaptation, quarantine, and promotion. A separate independent inference layer would duplicate the model-supply authority that C47 already defines.

C36 routes enterprise execution through C45 and forbids direct Sanctum exposure. A new externally visible inference microservice layer would create a membrane surface that current interface authority does not authorize.

C39 already provides delegated sampling request/result classes with model provenance disclosure. Backend-class visibility should ride these existing semantics instead of adding a parallel inference protocol.

C18 cost posture already assumes C45 leased cognition and C47 native adaptation. Capacity pooling, GPU scheduling, and substrate migration costs belong in that economics model rather than in a freestanding service layer.

C22 already carries leased-provider instability, sovereign compute operations, and staged rollout constraints. The implementation gap is a control-plane refinement and sequencing update, not a new independent stack layer.

T-300 forbids reviving blended old-stack forward authority. A literal independent inference microservice layer risks reintroducing a new cross-cutting protocol surface instead of extending Alternative C authorities.

lane_strategy: Improve the current task path without breaking core assumptions.

model_audit.routing_basis: AAS4 ordinary FULL_PIPELINE / IDEATION default future-branch routing target.

objective: Explore the smallest viable topology shift that still resolves the current ideation problem. Apply that branch specifically to 'Independent Model Inference Microservice Layer'.
problem_reframing: The real problem is not lack of a separately deployed inference microservice. It is lack of an explicit internal seam for backend-class selection, capacity routing, and provenance-visible substrate switching across leased and promoted native model pools.
smallest_viable_topology_shift: Keep all external and route authority in C45, but add a private substrate-routing plane inside C45 that binds each execution request to an approved backend class: leased provider capsule, promoted native model family, or deterministic local fallback. C47 remains the supplier of promoted native models, C42 remains the execution-priming boundary, C39 remains the provenance-visible delegated sampling surface, and C36 remains the membrane owner.
architectural_fit: Strong fit as a subordinate refinement, weak fit as a new subsystem. The smallest viable change is an internal C45 control-plane extension, not an independent layer.
required_integrations: C45 must remain the single authority for route-level execution mode and backend selection.
C42 must remain the authority for continuation and execution-primed handoff semantics.
C47 must remain the owner of model ingestion, adaptation, quarantine, and promotion.
C36 must continue to expose inference only through existing ENTERPRISE or FOUNDRY receptors, never a fresh direct inference membrane.
C39 should carry any backend provenance or realized model disclosure needed at the message layer.
C18 and C22 must absorb pool economics, GPU capacity planning, rollout sequencing, and fallback cost posture.
likely_downstream_task_shapes: DIRECT_SPEC: extend C45 with substrate-routing semantics, backend classes, capacity policy hooks, and backend selection evidence.
DIRECT_SPEC: extend C47 with promoted-model handoff contracts into the C45 substrate-routing plane.
DIRECT_SPEC: extend C39 only if current sampling provenance needs explicit backend-class disclosure.
DIRECT_SPEC: extend C18 and C22 with pooled inference economics, native migration milestones, and staged rollout gates.
No new FULL PIPELINE task unless the scope expands beyond routing and capacity control into a genuinely new cross-cutting authority.
integration_posture: Do not create an independent model inference microservice layer. Solve the problem by inserting one thin internal substrate-routing seam under C45 and keeping every other authority boundary intact.
recommended_next_action: If the idea advances, promote a narrower concept centered on C45 internal substrate routing and C47 promotion handoff, then test whether direct-spec extensions eliminate the need for any new authority at all.
